summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.log; import java.util.Date; import java.util.logging.Formatter; import java.util.logging.Handler; import java.util.logging.Level; import java.util.logging.LogRecord; public class LogHtmlFormatter extends Formatter { public String format(LogRecord rec) { StringBuffer buf = new StringBuffer(1000); if (rec.getLevel().intValue() >= Level.WARNING.intValue()) { buf.append(""); buf.append(rec.getLevel()); buf.append(""); } else { buf.append(rec.getLevel()); } buf.append(" "); buf.append(rec.getMillis()); buf.append(" >>> "); buf.append("From Class : ");
